             +---------------+
             |  API Gateway  |
             +-------+-------+
                     |
+[  Service Layer  ]-o---------------------------------+
|                    |                                 |
|                    |                                 |
|                    v                                 |
|           +----------------+                         |
|           |  User Service  |                         |
|           +--------+-------+                         |
|                    |                                 |
|          +---------+----------------------+          |
|          |                                |          |
|          |             +[  Data Layer  ]--o--------+ |
|          |             |                  |        | |
|          |             |                  |        | |
|          v             |                  v        | |
| +-----------------+    |            /-----------\  | |
| |  Order Service  |    |            |  User DB  |  | |
| +--------+--------+    |            \-----+-----/  | |
|          +--------+----o---------+        |        | |
|                        |         |        |        | |
|                        |         |        |        | |
|                        |         v        |        | |
|                        |  /------------\  |        | |
|                        |  |  Order DB  |  |        | |
|                        |  \------+-----/  |        | |
|                        |         |        |        | |
|                        |    +----+--------+        | |
|                        |    |                      | |
|                        +----o----------------------+ |
|                             |                        |
+-----------------------------o------------------------+
                              v
          +--------------------+
          |  Response Builder  |
          +--------------------+
